headline: Only 84.3% of clips have identifiable brands — a massive sponsorship blind spot
insight: 107 of 127 clips have brand data. At 400K clips, 62,800 clips have zero sponsorship intelligence. Equipment companies are flying blind. Pickle DaaS fixes that.

headline: 'JOOLA' dominates court visibility — 266 appearances across 127 clips
insight: Brand frequency: ['JOOLA(266)', 'Nike(29)', 'PICKLEBALL(3)', 'Courtana(3)', 'On(3)']. These brands get free exposure. Are they in winning moments? Pickle DaaS answers that for the first time.

headline: Brand × play quality correlation found: 'Courtana' clips avg 7.43/10 vs 'ONIX' at 5.33/10
insight: Shot quality by brand presence: {'Courtana': 7.43, 'CRBN': 7.19, 'APPLA': 7.12, 'PICKLEBALL': 7.05, 'PKLR': 6.95}. This is endorsement intelligence sports companies pay millions for. 'Our gear correlates with better play' — now data-proven.
evidence: Brand shot quality correlation: {'JOOLA': 6.76, 'PICKLEBALL': 7.05, 'Skull Logo': 6.8, 'ONIX': 5.33, 'RECOVERY CAVE': 5.73, 'Pickleball': 6.36, 'Courtana': 7.43, 'Nike': 6.79, 'PKLR': 6.95, 'On': 6.42, 'Onix': 6.42, 'The Underground': 5.82, 'Recovery Cave': 6.6, 'APPLA': 7.12, 'LIFE TIME PICKLEBALL': 5.88, 'Adidas': 6.56, 'CRBN': 7.19}

headline: 'Gatorade' is the biggest unowned sponsorship category — 72 clips with zero brand presence
insight: AI-detected sponsorship gaps: ['Gatorade(72)', 'BODYARMOR(67)', 'Yeti(49)', 'Nike(42)', 'Selkirk(36)']. These are zero-competition categories. First brand to activate gets 100% share of voice.

headline: Paddle intel: 'JOOLA' most identifiable — but 36% of paddles are brand-invisible
insight: Identified paddle brands: {'JOOLA': 77, 'CRBN': 2, 'Selkirk': 1, 'Onix': 1}. Paddle companies are effectively invisible in video. Pickle DaaS gives them eyes on the court for the first time.
